title: Cubercia Modpack
description: This modpack is designed exclusively for the Cubercia Network server network, offering optimizations and proven features to ensure exceptional performance and gameplay.
body:
# Cubercia Modpack

Welcome to the **Official Modpack** for the **Cubercia Network** server network! 🖥️✨ Designed to offer **unparalleled performance** and enhance your experience and gameplay on our servers.

Make the most of your stay with this modpack, specially optimized for you. 🎮🚀

---

## **FEATURES**:

🔧 **PRE-CONFIGURED**  
We have carefully adjusted this modpack to boost your experience on our network. It includes:
- **General performance optimization**
- **FPS boost**
- **Efficient render distance limitation**

⚡ **FPS BOOST**  
Thanks to several specialized mods, this modpack significantly improves FPS in the game, offering a smooth experience even on high refresh rate monitors. 🖥️🎯

🐞 **BUG FIXES**  
We have added mods that correct visual and physical bugs in the game, solving issues that would otherwise not receive a quick fix. ✅🔧

🌍 **32 CHUNKS RENDERING**  
Our server is optimized for a view distance of **up to 32 chunks** in Survival mode. 🗺️ This modpack truly loads the chunks, without rendering fictitious horizons.

🔄 **CONSTANTLY UPDATED**  
The Cubercia team works to keep this modpack always at the **latest stable version**, ensuring compatibility and optimal performance. 🔃📦  

---

## **IMPORTANT**:

⚠️ This modpack was designed **exclusively** for the **Cubercia Network** server network. Its use on other servers or in Single Player mode may result in limitations or reduced performance.

We are not responsible for errors or compatibility issues outside our network. 🌐🚫
